notes: Resolved the three tentative 'NRK / TV 2' World Cup quarterfinal channels that the 2026-07-06 run left as honest guesses — the split is now published. Via the authoritative NTB press release ('Slik sendes resten av fotball-VM på NRK og TV 2') cross-checked with the NRK VM program guide: France–Morocco (9 Jul, 20:00 UTC) → NRK; Spain–Belgium (10 Jul, 19:00 UTC) → TV 2; R16 7v8-winners QF (12 Jul 03:00 norsk / 01:00 UTC) → NRK. Both sources agree; dropped the tentative flags and set concrete single channels.
Confirmed VM-semifinale 1 (14 Jul) on TV 2 — NTB release states both semifinals air on TV 2 Play/TV 2 Direkte; bronsefinale + finalen on NRK (both already correct on the board).

Confirmed Diamond League Monaco (Meeting Herculis EBS): date Fri 10 July 2026 at Stade Louis-II and Sigrid Borge's women's-javelin entry via the official Diamond League site. NRK streaming retained (NRK holds Diamond League rights through 2029).
England–Norway QF (11 Jul) already correctly labelled TV 2 (TV 2 secured the Norway match) — no tentative flag, left as is; corroborated by the same NTB release.
